summary: Completed frontend testing of Tinkú auth flows (Fase 2). Fixed critical Server Actions origin mismatch error. Most flows working correctly. Found 1 middleware bug.

integration_issues.issue: Logged-in users can access /signup and /login pages directly (should redirect to /dashboard). Landing page (/) redirect works correctly.

action_items: FIX MIDDLEWARE BUG: Logged-in users can access /signup and /login pages directly instead of being redirected to /dashboard. The middleware code looks correct but getUser() may be returning null due to cookie handling issues in the proxy environment. Consider adding logging to middleware to debug.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Added allowedOrigins to next.config.mjs serverActions config to fix 'Invalid Server Actions request' error caused by x-forwarded-host/origin mismatch in Emergent preview environment
seed_data_creation: Created test user via signup flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test user created with email tinku-test-1776447878@example.com. Email NOT verified (double opt-in pending). Middleware redirect bug exists for /signup and /login pages when user is logged in. All other auth flows working correctly.
tests_passed: Landing page renders with hero-signup, hero-login, header-login testids
Signup form has all required testids (signup-fullname, signup-email, signup-password, signup-submit)
Signup validation errors display correctly (password too short shows err-password)
Dashboard shows verify-banner for unverified email
Dashboard shows disabled add-student-btn with 'próximo' text
Signout button (signout-btn) works and redirects to /login
Resend verification (verify-resend-btn) shows verify-resend-ok with 'Listo, volvemos a mandarlo.'
Login form has all required testids (login-email, login-password, login-submit)
Login with invalid credentials shows login-error with 'El email o la contraseña no coinciden.'
Login with valid credentials redirects to /dashboard
Signup with duplicate email shows signup-error with 'Este email ya tiene una cuenta. ¿Querés entrar?'
Unauthenticated user visiting /dashboard is redirected to /login
Logged-in user visiting / (landing) is redirected to /dashboard
tests_failed: Middleware: Logged-in user visiting /signup is NOT redirected to /dashboard (BUG)
Middleware: Logged-in user visiting /login is NOT redirected to /dashboard (BUG)

mocked_apis_list: Resend email delivery (stub → app_logs) - intentional for Ola 1

server_actions_error.issue: Error: Invalid Server Actions request - x-forwarded-host header mismatch
server_actions_error.root_cause: Next.js Server Actions security check fails when origin header (regla-clara.cluster-0.preview.emergentcf.cloud) doesn't match x-forwarded-host header (regla-clara.preview.emergentagent.com) in Emergent preview environment
server_actions_error.fix_applied: Added allowedOrigins array to next.config.mjs serverActions.experimental config with both preview domains and localhost

middleware_redirect_bug.issue: Logged-in users can access /signup and /login pages directly
middleware_redirect_bug.root_cause: Suspected: Supabase SSR getUser() may be returning null due to cookie handling issues when navigating directly to auth pages in proxy environment. The middleware code logic is correct.
reproduction_steps: 2. Navigate directly to /signup or /login via URL
middleware_redirect_bug.status: NOT FIXED - needs main agent investigation
